title: tragus varius
intro: Tragus varius, also known as Tragia, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which contribute to its potential in treating various health conditions. Tragus varius has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Tragus varius often take the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, and it is typically used in conjunction with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
